title: The Newborn Ones
description: A spore outbreak that slowly consumes your world.
body:
THIS MOD IS HEAVILY INSPIRED BY "THE LAST OF US" !!

 

Spoilers In Images.

 

You live in a world in which a outbreak forms. You struggle to seek food and shelter as you have been robbed, hurt, and broken mentally. The Cordyceps outbreak controls the human body in very inhumane ways. Fast forward a few years and you are trying to find a cure for this monstrosity, but little do you know that this will be no easy task. You will undergo multiple close death occasions with the risk of being infected with the Cordyceps. As you survive, every day passes like the others, but more violently. You goal is to survive as long as you can and find, or produce a cure. All it takes is one scratch or bite and you become the accursed environment you live in. 

 

This is a solo project meaning I have done this all BY MYSELF. I made the animations, models, and textures. I have no coders and I'm not planning on having any. This is my first mod so except a lot of changes in the future!

 

THIS IS NOT A HORROR MOD/DWELLER.

 

 

Questions you may ask

 

 

"Can I port your mod to bedrock?"

NO if I see my mod on bedrock I will take it down. ASK FOR PERMISSION!

 

"1.19.2?"

Not planning on it.

 

Any more questions can be asked in the comments.
